prompt: Dark cosmic background dissolves into a glowing indigo light burst. Bold title text materializes with cinematic depth. Dramatic slow zoom forward. Premium dark UI. Tagline fades in — 'Quantify every trade with probability math.'

Sleek smartphone floats on dark surface under studio light. Close-up lens drift toward screen. Finger taps the asset price field, soft glow pulses indigo around the input. Numbers populate with precise animation.

Smooth tilt-down shot reveals smartphone screen mid-scroll. Glowing position size field activates as a stylized finger types '1'. Indigo highlight ripples outward. Clean dark UI. Cinematic shallow depth of field.

Slow upward camera reveal on floating smartphone. Screen scrolls to expose price targets section. Indigo section header glows to life. Probability columns appear with staggered fade-in. Premium editorial lighting.

Extreme close-up push into smartphone screen. Finger enters a take-profit price target. Field pulses with indigo glow on input. Probability percentage column responds dynamically. Cinematic rack focus, dark ambient backdrop.

Wide cinematic pull-back from smartphone screen revealing bold expected value result. Numbers resolve with dramatic glow in indigo. Soft lens flare sweeps across. Studio lighting intensifies. Result locks into frame confidently.

Pure deep-space dark background. EV Calculator logo fades in centered with soft indigo glow. Tagline text reveals letter by letter. 'Try it free' CTA pulses gently. Clean, minimal. Premium Apple-style brand card.
